# Chadow

> Chadow is a World of Tanks community portal with ABS replay analysis, recruiting, tournament brackets, tactical planning boards, and aim trainers. The site is available in Russian and English.

Use the links below to discover public pages and services.

## Main

- [Home (Russian)](https://chadow.ru/): Project hub and service overview
- [Home (English)](https://chadow.ru/en): English version of the project hub

## Services

- [ABS Replay Analysis](https://chadow.ru/services/abs): Upload replays and review team statistics, WGSRT, and battle metrics
- [ABS Replay Analysis (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/services/abs): English version of the replay analysis service
- [Recruiting](https://chadow.ru/services/recruiting): Search for teams, clans, and players
- [Recruiting (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/services/recruiting): English version of the recruiting board
- [Tournament Brackets](https://chadow.ru/services/bracket): Create and browse tournament brackets
- [Tournament Brackets (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/services/bracket): English version of the bracket generator
- [Tactical Board](https://chadow.ru/services/tactics): Collaborative tactics planning on map overlays
- [Tactical Board (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/services/tactics): English version of the tactical board
- [Aim Trainers](https://chadow.ru/services/aim): Mini-games for aim and reaction training
- [Aim Trainers (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/services/aim): English version of the aim trainers

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://chadow.ru/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable URLs
- [Login](https://chadow.ru/auth/login): User authentication
- [Login (English)](https://chadow.ru/en/auth/login): English login page
